name: Elastic
comment:
Elm simple elastic query parser & serializer

This package allow to parse an [elastic simple query string](https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/query-dsl-simple-query-string-query.html#_simple_query_string_syntax) into an AST.

`~N` tokenizer are not supported.


# Parser

@docs parseQuery


# Serializer

@docs serializeExpr

values.name: parseQuery
values.comment: parse an elastic simple query string and convert into an AST

values.name: serializeExpr
values.comment: serialize an AST into simple query string for elastic search

name: Elastic.Expression
comment:
Elastic Expression

Expr can help you to define kind of syntax like And, Or, ....


# Definition

@docs Expr

unions.name: Expr
unions.comment:
An `Expr` Type represent all AST's branchs

    type AST
        = And AST AST
        | Or AST AST
        | Exclude AST
        | Exact String
        | Word String
        | Prefix String

In our case, to follow the production rules `AST` will be `Expr`

    type Expr
        = And Expr Expr
        | Exact String
        | Exclude Expr
        | Or Expr Expr
        | Prefix String
        | Word String
